summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen on Free60+ and Free20 devices, with no placeholder on builds 32 & 46 and duplicate placeholders on production.
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen on Free60+ and Free20 devices. No placeholder image is displayed on build 32 & 46, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app. Expected: Headset image should appear on the Home Screen.
steps: 1. Launch the app on a Free60+ or Free20 device.
3. Observe the area where the headset image should be displayed.
4. Check if a placeholder image is shown instead of the headset image.
5. Note the build version (32, 46, or production) to compare behavior.
expected: Headset image should appear on the Home Screen.
actual: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen on Free60+ and Free20 devices. No placeholder image is displayed on build 32 & 46, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app.
